# Transcrição: 06 Cold Targeting - Hacks #3 - Axciom

## [00:00 - 03:01]

Alright guys, so here it is. Here's the hack you've been waiting to access. This stuff is beyond cool. Now this is getting Facebook's very own data company to create the targeting for your clients and in many cases go into the actual ad accounts and set it up for you free of charge. So these are the third-party providers that sell data to Facebook. So for example if you're thinking about when you're targeting customers or leads in the United States, you have a lot more options there than say Canada or Australia or New Zealand. Why is that? Well that's because there's third-party companies selling data to Facebook so there's a lot more data available for those audiences. Axiom is one of those companies so it's A-C-X-I-O-M. Now what we want to do is go to axiom.com slash data guru and you'll see the hyperlink up here. So if you head to this website right here and essentially what you're going to see here is do you need data recommendations for targeting audiences both online and offline and you're just going to submit the information that you want here the country, company, phone, industry, campaign objectives, who you're trying to target, are they moms, are they entrepreneurs, are they people going to dentists, who is it that you're trying to target essentially and they're going to come back with some recommendations in terms of the targeting that you should be using pulling the data that they have access to. Now just a word of warning here axiom is renowned for being a little bit temperamental in terms of who you get access to, who your email gets sent to it seems like on that day so it's not uncommon for you to have to try to email them two times to get a response from them. Sometimes you'll just email them one time and they'll get back to you right away but it is not uncommon for people to have to email them or just send them another reminder like hey where are we at with this before they get back with you and then it's not always guaranteed that they will go into the ad account and set that up for you. So typically they'll respond with this, they'll respond with hey we think you should target this and then they will normally ask you do you want us to go in and set that up for you in the campaigns and then you'll provide them with access and they'll go in and set everything up for you. So that's axiom, this is using Facebook's very own data company to provide you with some targeting insights. Now this is not always going to be the be all and end all right just like with everything in Facebook ads, test it out it's just like using a lookalike for example it's one way to target, doesn't mean it's going to be the best way or the perfect way for your client but certainly it's an alternative, it's a great opportunity if you're sort of at a

## [03:01 - 03:13]

loss of who to target and you don't have lookalikes to work with or you don't have many custom audiences to use. Using axiom at top of funnel cold audience is a great little hack to employ.
